free_text: Modelling of the interactions between galactic cosmic
rays with stone and iron meteorites - Thin-target
All nuclear data were taken from W.Westmeier,
After the irradiations the samples were measured by
means of gamma-spectrometry in Hannover. Using several
heavily shielded Ge(Li)- and HPGe-detectors each
sample was measured up to 20 times in a period of up
to one and a half year after the corresponding
Not a revision of earlier data
Cross section for target Z<=29 are corrected for the
contribution of secondary particles unless a remark
is given. The correction is not performed for Sr, Y,
Zr. Nb, Rh and Ba target.
